# פיכפיכידע — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> פיכפיכידע is a unique and playful educational brand that combines the fun art of bubble-blowing (פכפוך) with knowledge-building lessons. The brand has a creative, lighthearted personality with a clever wordplay name blending 'פכפוך' (bubbling/splashing) and 'ידע' (knowledge). The site requires a private registration page accessible only via a shared link, with form submissions forwarded to a designated email. The owner's logo is intended to be used as the website background.

---

## How to Contact Us

- Email: 88991010nuahe@gmail.com
- Phone: +972506875621
- Phone (tel): tel:+972506875621
- Address: פרחי העץ, יבנה, ישראל, 21457, ישראל

### Contact form
- URL: https://pikhpikhida.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://pikhpikhida.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `first_name` (text, required)
  - `last_name` (text, required)
  - `age` (number, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About פיכפיכידע
פיכפיכידע is a unique and playful educational brand that combines the fun art of bubble-blowing (פכפוך) with knowledge-building lessons. The brand has a creative, lighthearted personality with a clever wordplay name blending 'פכפוך' (bubbling/splashing) and 'ידע' (knowledge). The site requires a private registration page accessible only via a shared link, with form submissions forwarded to a designated email. The owner's logo is intended to be used as the website background.

## Target Audience
- ילדים והורים

## Industry
Education

---

- Robots: https://pikhpikhida.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://pikhpikhida.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
